experience.title: IT & Software Intern Pune, India
experience.summary:
• Designed an enterprise workforce monitoring platform supporting real-time activity tracking, browser monitoring,
application analytics, and configurable screenshot capture from 5 seconds to 24 hours.
• Implemented live screen monitoring, recording, and automated reporting workflows tested across 3+ enterprise
devices during the development phase.
• Engineered authentication, authorized-device validation, and role-based access control with 4+ user roles, alongside
browser URL and file tracking modules.

experience.title: Technology Analyst Intern Bengaluru, India
experience.summary:
• Built a machine learning–powered dashboard that reduced anomaly detection time by 30%, improving client
onboarding issue resolution and enhancing the user experience for internal teams.
• Designed Python scripts to parse and analyze 50,000+ daily log entries, enabling the identification of performance
bottlenecks.
• Visualized operational metrics through 15+ Dash components, enabling leadership to track log behavior trends.

experience.title: Data Analysis and Research Intern Remote
experience.summary:
• Examined sustainability strategies of 20+ national and international firms to inform 3 product positioning
decisions.
• Synthesized Power BI dashboards that improved clarity of insights by 20%, empowering management to act faster
on strategic decisions. Standardized ESG benchmarking formats across 5 power companies
